title: Switch zone abstraction to click-driven collapse and expand
description: Replace the visible abstraction slider workflow with direct click interaction: visible zone areas collapse into representative abstraction nodes, and representative nodes expand back on click.
decision_notes: Kept the existing abstractionLevel API for compatibility, but removed the playground/viewer controls that exposed the slider as the primary UX.
Added explicit collapsedAbstractions state so interactions can collapse individual zone/subgraph keys without using depth.
Zone overlay groups are clickable and collapse their zone key; collapsed abstraction nodes are clickable and expand their key.
Pan/zoom ignores pointer starts on clickable zone and abstraction elements so clicks remain reliable.
verification: Browser check at http://127.0.0.1:4174/: abstraction slider controls absent; zone ON renders zones; clicking gcp collapses to zone:gcp; clicking that node restores APIGW/GCPApp/CloudSQL and the gcp zone.
notes: Subgraph keys are supported in the projection state, but subgraphs remain authoring-only in the current visible taxonomy; zone is the verified clickable surface.
